text.title: Graceful Offboard Script Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is a named single accountable owner present (not 'team' / 'we' / 'us')?
Is the source-of-truth for required inputs reachable and citable?

conclusion.verdict: apply the methodology; produce the versioned spec artefact and validate it.
defer until source-of-truth is reachable; paraphrased substitutes are worse than skipping.
block; require a single named owner before any further work.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, Skip-If clear → owner is named human → inputs are pinned to engagement files → produce + validate the artefact.
